name: Color-Based Segmentation of Image Regions
description: You are designing a computer vision pipeline for vegetable sorting. Using the 'Peppers' sample image, create a binary mask that isolates only the green pepper, excluding the red and yellow peppers and the background. The resulting mask must use pixel values of 0 for the background and 255 for the green pepper. Save this binary mask as a PNG file to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/green_pepper_mask.png.
